info.name: Evidence (Framework - not a REST API)
info.description: Evidence is an open-source (MIT) business-intelligence-as-code framework that compiles SQL + Markdown into a static data app via a Node CLI and a DuckDB-WASM Universal SQL query layer. It is not a hosted REST API, so this collection contains no HTTP request items - only documentation references. See https://docs.evidence.dev/ and https://docs.evidence.dev/reference/cli.

items.docs: Core documentation for the Evidence SQL + Markdown framework.
CLI reference (dev, build, preview, sources) - the framework interface in place of a REST API.
The in-process query engine that runs SQL against data sources extracted to Parquet.
